title: limonium neocastellonense
intro: Limonium neocastellonense, also known as the Castellon sea lavender, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Limonium neocastellonense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Limonium neocastellonense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its uses and effects.
